purpose: Seeded live-gate threshold bands for paper maturity, verification pass rate, daily loss caps, and participation rate. Research starting points only — NOT live-trading approval.

paper_maturity.meaning: Minimum paper trading calendar days before live gate may pass

verification_pass_rate.meaning: Minimum verification pass rate on paper action traces

daily_loss_bps.meaning: Daily realized loss cap as basis points of equity

participation_rate.meaning: Almgren-Chriss style participation rate band for live gate posture review

policyRule: Bands inform checklist thresholds and operating-limit envelopes. Live arming still requires fresh evidence, operator confirmation, and immutable guardrail packages.
